name: N - Natural Harmonia
description: N is a tall, thin young man. He is fair-skinned with blue eyes and long tea green hair tied into a low fluffy ponytail and shorter streams framing his face. He wears a white, mid-sleeved shirt with a black shirt under it, a pair of cider green slip on shoes and beige skinny fit pants. His most notable feature is his hat, which is white and black with a black peak
creator: Satoshin
